apps.name: Availability Concierge
apps.description: Reactive triage of informal inbound scheduling asks into a trackable pipeline.

apps.name: Irregular Income Planner
apps.description: Safe-to-spend draw computed from your own logged, lumpy income history.

apps.name: Night Sky Logbook
apps.description: Nightly recomputed, location-scored sky visibility plus an observation log; AR sky-pointing deliberately deferred to v1.1 rather than risking a fragile v1 centerpiece.

apps.name: Referral Loop
apps.description: Narrow referral-chain tracker: who referred whom, did it convert, was the loop closed.

apps.name: Scenario Ledger
apps.description: Manually-modeled, side-by-side life-decision what-if scenarios, no bank linking.

apps.name: Wordsmith Atlas
apps.description: Personal word-relationship graph with proactive resurfacing of forgotten connections, not a static dictionary.
